title: Trailer Recreation Port (1.20-1.21.8)
description: The ultimate bare bones experience ported to other version of Minecraft.
body:
![Trailer Recreation Port](https://i.imgur.com/sGkx3ts.png)
---
A port for anyone who wants the trailer experience on other versions of the game.

Here are the list of version this modpack supports:
- 1.20
- 1.20.1
- 1.20.2
- 1.20.6
- 1.21
- 1.21.4
- 1.21.5
- 1.21.6
- 1.21.7
- 1.21.8

If you the offical modpack be sure to check out the original [Low Res Trailer Recreation](https://modrinth.com/modpack/low-res-trailer-recreation) modpack by [lowresbones](https://modrinth.com/user/lowresbones)

![Friends Beneath the Horizon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zgck6VQ1/images/55ed36161d29f0fd2804e77ae39af3d008a0fe0e.jpeg)

![Cherry Blossom Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zgck6VQ1/images/b1494d326a5f7c974495ccf01570863d3320bea4.png)
